name: test-fix
description: Run the test suite(s) and fix failures until green.
fixPrompt: The test run above failed with the attached output. For each failure decide first: is the test wrong, or is the code wrong? Fix the one that violates the documented behavior. Re-run only the affected files first to iterate quickly, but the loop checks always run the full suite.
guardrails: Never skip, delete, or weaken a failing test to converge — fix the cause.
Never loosen an assertion without evidence the original assertion was wrong.
Do not add real network calls or remove mocks of external services to make a test pass.
onExhausted: Stop. Report each remaining failing test with its error output, what was attempted per iteration, and whether the failure looks like a test bug, a code bug, or an environment issue.
